title: The Commissions for Protection of Child Rights Act, 2005
full_text: The Commissions for Protection of Child Rights Act, 2005 बालक अधिकार संरक्षण आयोग अधिनियम, 2005 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200604 Act Number: 04 Enactment Date: 2006-01-20 Act Year: 2006 Short Title: The Commissions for Protection of Child Rights Act, 2005 Hindi Title: बालक अधिकार संरक्षण आयोग अधिनियम, 2005 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution of a National Commission and State Commissions for Protection of Child Rights and Children's Courts for providing speedy trial of offences against children or of violation of child rights and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development Enforcement Date: 05-02-2007 Notification: 5th February, 2007, vide notification No. S.O. 229(E), dated 15th February, 2007, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec.3(ii). Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Constitution of National Commission for Protection of Child Rights. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Appointment of Chairperson and Members. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Term of office and conditions of service of Chairperson and Members. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Salary and allowances of Chairperson and Members. Section 7. Removal from office. Section 8. Vacation of office by Chairperson or Member. Section 9. Vacancies, etc., not to invalidate proceedings of Commission. Section 10. Procedure for transaction of business. Section 11. Member-Secretary, officers and other employees of Commission. Section 12. Salaries and allowances to be paid out of grants. Section 13. Functions of Commission. Section 14. Powers relating to inquiries. Section 15. Steps after inquiry. Section 16. Annual and special reports of Commission. Section 17. Constitution of State Commission for Protection of Child Rights. Section 18. Appointment of Chairperson and other Members. Section 19. Term of office and conditions of service of Chairperson and Members. Section 20. Salary and allowances and Chairperson and Members. Section 21. Secretary, officers and other employees of the State Commission. Section 22. Salaries and allowances to be paid out of grants. Section 23. Annual and special reports of State Commission. Section 24. Application of certain provisions relating to National Commission for Protection of Child Rights to State Commissions. Section 25. Children’s Courts. Section 26. Special Public Prosecutor. Section 27. Grants by Central Government. Section 28. Grants by State Governments. Section 29. Accounts and audit of Commission. Section 30. Accounts and audit of State Commission. Section 31. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 32. Chairperson, Members and other officers to be public servant. Section 33. Directions by Central Government. Section 34. Returns or information. Section 35. Power of Central Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 36. Power of State Government to make rules. Section 37. Power to remove difficulties.
